response.overview: In an age dominated by identity politics and increasingly intrusive bureaucracies, this work is a celebration of privacy, personal freedom, and diversity of being. As we are defined and divided by institutional language and algorithmic data systems, urgent global issues affecting all of humanity are spiraling out of control and being ignored. Choosing to Prefer Not to Say is an act of protest in a refusal to be reduced by bureaucratic categories that divide and flatten the complexity of our lived experience.
response.title: Prefer Not To Say
